body.title: Warn on missing required description fields at cc_queue.py add time (ticket-field-lint)
body.result: added _check_description_contracts() + wired into cmd_add; warns on missing Affected files/Scope boundary/Test plan sections (non-blocking)
body.description:
Boris Cherny's lens: contracts should be checkable at the boundary, not discovered at runtime. Today ticket descriptions are freeform — the required sections (Affected files, Scope boundary, Test plan) are convention enforced only by audit-ticket in /decided. Add a warning (not a block) at cc_queue.py cmd_add time: if description is provided and is missing one or more of the required labeled sections, print a clear warning listing the missing ones. Does not block filing (Akien can override). Makes the gap visible at the moment of filing instead of at sprint-time.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py (cmd_add validation), lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py (new _check_description_contracts helper)
**Design rules:** none specific
**Scope boundary:** In scope: warning on missing sections in cmd_add. Out of scope: blocking the add, retroactive checking of existing tickets, changing the description format.
**Test plan:** Add a ticket with no Affected files section → warning printed, ticket still added. Add a ticket with all three sections → no warning. Add a ticket with no description → no warning (nothing to check).
